articles.title: Xbox Elite Series 3 Controller Leaks With Highly Customizable Design and New Controls - TechPowerUp
articles.description: Hot on the heels of the leaked compact Xbox cloud gaming controller, the same site responsible for the aforementioned leak has published regulatory images of what looks to be a successor to the Xbox Elite 2 wireless controller. The Elite 3, as it were, looks …
articles.content: Been through about four Elite 2 controllers over the years and I look after my stuff. Two eventually failed to left stick drift, all of them had an issue with the B button not working great, and one … [+698 chars]

articles.author: Frances Yue, Christine Idzelis, Tomi Kilgore, Steve Goldstein, Jamie Chisholm, Jules Rimmer
articles.title: Stock Market News May 14, 2026: S&P 500 and Nasdaq notch new records, Dow ends above 50,000 with U.S. retail-sales data and Trump’s China trip in focus - MarketWatch
articles.description: U.S. stocks ended higher Thursday, as tech rallied and investors assessed fresh data on retail sales and initial jobless claims. Cisco shares surged after the company said it would invest more in AI and cut workers.
